name: cultcache-ts
description: CultCache-style typed persistence for TypeScript with schema-backed polymorphic MessagePack storage.

scripts.dev:inspector: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --config vite.inspector.config.ts" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env CULTCACHE_INSPECTOR_DEV_SERVER=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron electron/main.cjs"
scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/cult-cache.test.js

author: metacratic
